proven.claim: Claim: The sum of `c.proven.length` over all contracts is ≥ 0.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Semantic Correctness (reduce sum is non‑negative)
; LINE: 497
; Claim: The sum of `c.proven.length` over all contracts is ≥ 0.
(declare-const n_contracts Int)          ; number of contracts
(declare-const sum_proven Int)           ; result of the reduce
; Each contract’s proven array length is a natural number.
(declare-const each_len Int)

; Preconditions derived from the program:
(assert (>= n_contracts 0))               ; length of contracts array
(assert (>= each_len 0))                  ; each .proven.length ≥ 0
; The reduce adds up n_contracts non‑negative numbers.
(assert (= sum_proven (* each_len n_contracts)))
(assert (>= sum_proven 0))

; Negate the intended invariant:
(assert (< sum_proven 0))

(check-sat)   ; unsat → the sum cannot be negative.
